source.query: SELECT mm.id, g.id AS game_id, g.name AS game_name, p.name AS platform_name, mm.onlinecoop, mm.offlinecoop, mm.lancoop, mm.campaigncoop, mm.splitscreen, mm.dropin, mm.onlinemax, mm.onlinecoopmax, mm.offlinemax, mm.offlinecoopmax, g.total_rating, g.total_rating_count, g.hypes, CASE WHEN mm.onlinecoop = true AND mm.offlinecoop = true THEN 'Full Co-op' WHEN mm.onlinecoop = true THEN 'Online Only' WHEN mm.offlinecoop = true THEN 'Offline Only' ELSE 'Competitive / Other' END AS coop_category FROM games_analytics_silver.multiplayer_modes mm JOIN games_analytics_silver.games g ON g.id = mm.game LEFT JOIN games_analytics_silver.platforms p ON p.id = mm.platform
